case_title: FISHER, KIMBERLEY vs. CANNON, ANNA MARIA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CANNON, ANNA MARIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1871 MCALLISTER STREET, S.F., STAYED UNTIL SEP-15-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. NO FURTHER STAYS. EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS AND ATTY FEES. PLTF TO PAY DEFT $1,600- ON OR BEFORE 9/15/97 IF DEFT VOLUNTARILY VACATES BY 5PM 9/15/97. SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE HANDLED ACCORDING TO LAW.
